programme.desc: Filmed on the sub-Antarctic island of South Georgia over a period of five months, Sir David Attenborough's immersive documentary explores the extraordinary lives of king penguins.

programme.title: A Cheetah's Pride
programme.desc: Rejoin the cheetah family as the mothers collaborate to keep the cubs fed, then watch the cubs survive abandonment and harsh conditions.

programme.title: Big Cat Country
programme.desc: With their leader badly wounded, the Hollywood lionesses retreat and regroup. Meanwhile, the MK females use their feminine wiles to distract the nomadic band of bachelors.

programme.title: Big Cats Small World
programme.desc: Cheetah mum Phefo and lion mum Tshaba teach their cubs survival skills, lion king Molelo goes into battle, and leopard Senatia tries to ensure his legacy around the Gomoti river.

programme.title: Big Cats Small World
programme.desc: Track Molelo's pride, who are exhausted when the winter floods arrive, and witness a scary encounter that gives leopard mum Sephiri a decision to make. (2 of 2)

programme.title: Warehouse 13
programme.desc: Pete and Myka head to Vegas to investigate murders connected to the world of high magic, while Claudia and Jinks search for an artefact used to rig horse races.

programme.title: Warehouse 13
programme.desc: HG Wells helps Pete and Myka with an artefact that is forcing confessions out of criminals, while the rest of the team deals with earthquakes inside the Warehouse.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: After witnessing an accident, Andrea and Michonne are introduced to a new community of survivors. As conflicts arise with their new acquaintances, a decision must be made.

programme.title: From
programme.desc: Julie finds comfort in her new friends as Jim and Tabitha revaluate their marriage. Sara gets another horrifying directive. Strong language/violence.

programme.title: The Swarm
programme.desc: Cecile recommends stopping fishing off the coast and warning the population against using tap water while the worms are investigated more closely.

programme.title: Most Haunted
programme.desc: Medium Johnnie Firori looks for spooks at Coalhouse Fort in Essex, a site believed to be a hotbed of paranormal activity such as mists, orbs and sudden drops in room temperature.
